86475bd80895d9bbc6c3be04a060f9d6b9a17178:
Here are the extracted software requirements:

P01|REQ_1|The system shall refresh the display every 60 seconds.|FR
P01|REQ_2|The application shall match the color of the schema set forth by Department of Homeland Security|NFR
P01|REQ_3|If projected, the data must be readable. On a 10x10 projection screen, 90% of viewers must be able to read Event/Activity data from a viewing distance of 30|NFR
P01|REQ_4|The product shall be available during normal business hours. As long as the user has access to the client PC, the system will be available 99% of the time during the first six months of operation.|NFR
P01|REQ_5|If projected, the data must be understandable. On a 10x10 projection screen, 90% of viewers must be able to determine that Events or Activities are occurring in current time from a viewing distance of 100|NFR
P01|REQ_6|The product shall ensure that it can only be accessed by authorized users. The product will be able to distinguish between authorized and unauthorized users in all access attempts|NFR
P01|REQ_7|The product shall be intuitive and self-explanatory|NFR
9b6854998471ebd18e4ab553665800791c323795:
Here are the extracted software requirements:

P01|REQ_1|90% of new users shall be able to start the display of Events or Activities within 90 minutes of using the product.,US|FR

P01|REQ_2|The product shall respond fast to keep up-to-date data in the display.,PE|NFR

P01|REQ_3|The system shall have a MDI form that allows for the viewing of the graph and the data table.,F|FR

P01|REQ_4|The system shall display Events in a vertical table by time.,F|FR

P01|REQ_5|The system shall display the Events in a graph by time.,F|FR

P01|REQ_6|The system shall display Events or Activities.,F|FR

P01|REQ_7|The display shall have two regions: left 2/3 of the display is graphical, right 1/3 of the display is a data table.,F|FR

P01|REQ_8|The data displayed in both the nodes within the graph and the rows in the table are MSEL Summary data.,F|FR

P01|REQ_9|The table side of the display shall be split into 2 regions: sequential and temporal.,F|FR

P01|REQ_10|The top 1/4 of the table will hold events that are to occur sequentially.,F|FR

P01|REQ_11|The bottom 3/4 of the table will hold events that occur according to its relevance to current time.,F|FR

P01|REQ_12|The system shall color code events according to their variance from current time.,F|FR

P01|REQ_13|The system shall display data from the Sync Matrix 1.0 and Exercise Management Tool 1.0 applications.,F|FR

P01|REQ_14|The system shall link Events back to either the Sync Matrix 1.0 or the Exercise Managment Tool 1.0 applications for modifications.,F|FR

P01|REQ_15|The system shall allow modification of the display.,F|FR

P01|REQ_16|The system shall offer a display of all the Events in the exercise.,F|FR

P01|REQ_17|The system shall filter data by: Venues and Key Events.,F|FR

P01|REQ_18|The system shall allow a user to define the time segments.,F|FR

P01|REQ_19|The system shall display the local and exercise time in separate clocks.,F|FR

P01|REQ_20|The system shall offer the ability to pause and resume the refresh of data.,F|FR

P01|REQ_21|The system shall provide charts for the Activity or Event actual versus assumed time.,F|FR

P01|REQ_22|The system shall provide a history report of changes made to the Activity or Event data.,F|FR

P01|REQ_23|The look and feel of the system shall conform to the user interface standards of the smart device.,LF|NFR

P01|REQ_24|The user interface shall have standard menus buttons for navigation.,LF|NFR

P01|REQ_25|The system shall have a professional appearance.,LF|NFR

P01|REQ_26|The product shall have a consistent color scheme and fonts.,LF|NFR

P01|REQ_27|The system shall be used by realtors with no training.,US|FR

P01|REQ_28|The system shall be intuitive and self explanatory.,US|FR

P01|REQ_29|The product shall be easy for a realtor to learn.,US|FR

P01|REQ_30|The product shall use symbols and words that are naturally understandable by the realtor community.,US|FR

P01|REQ_31|The product shall produce search results in an acceptable time.,PE|NFR

P01|REQ_32|The search results shall be returned no later 30 seconds after the user has entered the search criteria.,PE|NFR

P01|REQ_33|The product shall generate a CMA report in an acceptable time.,PE|NFR

P01|REQ_34|The CMA report shall be returned no later 60 seconds after the user has entered the CMA report criteria.,PE|NFR

P01|REQ_35|The product shall synchronize contacts and appointments in an acceptable time.,PE|NFR

P01|REQ_36|The product shall synchronize with the office system every hour.,PE|NFR

P01|REQ_37|The product shall be available for use 24 hours per day, 365 days per year.,A|NFR
